paths.notes: This file itself. Only writable by `code-architect owners bootstrap` or `owners migrate`; never a general edit target.
Config dir for CA-managed lockfiles + contracts. Run.lock is handled atomically by safe-json; humans review anything else.
Claude Code PostToolUse/PreToolUse hooks (post_tool_audit.py writes to logs/acd-activity.jsonl; pre_tool_validate.py gates bash). Behavior-critical for the audit trail; humans review every change.
Hook wiring. Editing this can silently disable the activity-log audit trail; humans review.
ACD's own skill packs (pre-production, project-tracking, post-production, delivery, creative-direction, reporting, shutdown). Agent-authored creative workflow; CA never writes.
ACD sub-agent definitions (brief-generator, kai-liaison). Agent-owned; CA never writes.
ACD's reference docs (ecosystem.md, platform-specs.md, project-templates.md, production-protocol.md). Agent-owned content; CA never writes.
Claude Code per-project state (untracked; appears in current dirty status). Agent-owned ephemeral state.
Append-only PostToolUse audit log written by .claude/hooks/post_tool_audit.py. CA must never touch — drift here breaks the audit trail.
ACD mesh-send queue/journal. Written by daemon + mesh_client.py; CA must never touch.
Generated creative-brief artifacts. ACD runtime output; CA never writes. Gitignored anyway.
Queued client-facing comms awaiting Alex review. PII-adjacent; CA never writes.
ACD runtime logs (rclone, activity, mesh outbox). Gitignored per .gitignore (logs/*.jsonl, logs/briefs/*). CA never writes.
ACD's session memory (session-YYYY-MM-DD.md). Agent's own; CA never writes.

ACD's creative-direction knowledge base (clients/, creative-direction/, crew/, equipment/, shot-lists/, production-history.md, creative-tools-research*). Brand/creative authority; CA reads for graph-walk but never writes.
Python test tree (test_mesh_client_a2a.py + future). Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated.

Conductor.db access layer. ACD owns creative_briefs/revision_cycles/deliverables/production_days/creative_references tables (shared DB with Kai). Schema/query changes have cross-agent blast radius; humans review.
A2A v1.0 mesh-send surface (message_id == metadata.idempotency_key, correlation_id, expires_at). Contract-sensitive — this file was just patched in 1435d9b. Humans review.
Python bytecode cache. Runtime-generated; CA never writes. Gitignored.

Shared library code (asset_expander, brand_system, creative_audit, gear_checker, production_strategy). db.py + mesh_client.py carved out above as contract-sensitive. Remainder is mechanical-refactor friendly; DA-gated.
Flask dashboard (app.py). User/client-facing UI; humans review.
Deterministic creative calculators (setup_calculator.py + future). Per CLAUDE.md architect-builder split, ACD relies on these for reproducible specs — accuracy is load-bearing; humans review.
Vision/CV scripts (currently empty; placeholder per requirements.txt opencv comment). When populated, will touch image analysis — humans review.
ACD long-running daemon (PM2 entry per ecosystem.config.js, port 3342). Mesh I/O + lifecycle critical; humans review every change.
Python bytecode cache. Runtime-generated; CA never writes. Gitignored.
Mac-Mini deploy script (rsync to kai@100.64.114.13:/Users/kai/acd). Deploy-pipeline; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory.
Catch-all for top-level scripts and any unknown subdirs. Default to human review until a sub-lane is carved out explicitly.
PM2 process config (acd-daemon, /Users/kai/acd, conductor.db wiring, port 3342). Deploy-pipeline territory; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory.
CI/CD workflows (deploy.yml: Tailscale + SSH to Mac Mini on push). Deploy-pipeline; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory.
Python deps (flask, requests, anthropic). Humans review additions/removals.

fallback.notes: Default-deny posture: anything not matched above (CLAUDE.md, top-level docs, .gitignore, ad-hoc files) requires human review.
